caption: A man is performing a martial arts demonstration with a long staff in a large banquet hall. He is dressed in a blue martial arts uniform and is holding a staff with a red tassel attached to one end. The man is moving the staff around in a fluid motion, demonstrating his skill and control over the weapon. The audience is seated at tables around the room, watching the performance intently. The room is well-lit and has a high ceiling with chandeliers hanging from it. The man continues to move the staff around, showcasing various techniques and movements. The audience remains engaged throughout the performance, watching as the man displays his mastery of the martial art.
